exactMoveRequired.label: Exact move required
exactMoveRequired.description: When enabled, a pawn must land exactly on its destination. Direction reversals are not allowed: bouncing off a blocked start tile or overshooting the finish lane will be rejected as an illegal move.

gettingOnBoard.title: Getting on the board
gettingOnBoard.ace: Ace: place a pawn on the board, or move an active pawn 1 step forward.
gettingOnBoard.king: King: place a pawn on the board.

specialCards.title: Special Cards
specialCards.four: Four: move 4 steps backward. Tip: use this on your start tile to cut across the entire board.
specialCards.seven: Seven: make 7 steps total with one or two pawns. Pawn 1 always moves first.
specialCards.jack: Jack: swap your pawn with an enemy pawn. Select the card first, then choose an enemy pawn.
